description: Catalogue des services/intégrations MCP — définit les credentials requis, endpoints de validation et paramètres par défaut

figma.label: Figma
figma.description_en: Design files, tokens & UI signals via MCP
figma.description_fr: Fichiers design, tokens & signaux UI via MCP

credentials.help_en:
Create a token at https://www.figma.com/developers/api#authentication
Required scopes: file:read, projects:read
credentials.help_fr:
Créez un token sur https://www.figma.com/developers/api#authentication
Scopes requis : file:read, projects:read

gitlab.label: GitLab
gitlab.description_en: Repos, issues, merge requests & CI/CD via MCP
gitlab.description_fr: Repos, issues, merge requests & CI/CD via MCP

credentials.help_en:
Create a token at GitLab > Settings > Access Tokens
Required scopes: api, read_user
credentials.help_fr:
Créez un token sur GitLab > Paramètres > Access Tokens
Scopes requis : api, read_user

credentials.help_en: Your GitLab instance URL (leave empty for gitlab.com)
credentials.help_fr: URL de votre instance GitLab (laisser vide pour gitlab.com)
